payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet with two recessed paneled doors filling most of the crop; top and side edges are cut off (edge-cropped), finish appears satin with faint reflections, and the cabinet is approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden cabinet doors cropped","long_description":"Dark brown wooden cabinet with two recessed paneled doors filling most of the crop; top and side edges are cut off (edge-cropped), finish appears satin with faint reflections, and the cabinet is approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown","wooden","two recessed panel doors","edge-cropped top and sides","satin/low-gloss finish","vertical seam between doors","no handles clearly visible","appears built-in/full-height"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
